caption: A person wearing white gloves interacts with a colorful educational game board laid out on a gray surface. Beside the board is a pile of small, light-brown wooden cylinders. The board features a grid of red and blue circles, each containing a white number from 1 to 9. Illustrations of people and landscapes decorate the edges of the board. In the sequence, the person's gloved hand reaches toward the board to place a wooden cylinder onto one of the numbered circles. Another individual is partially visible, with their bare feet resting on the gray surface next to the game. As the action progresses, the person continues to move wooden pieces from the pile onto specific numbered spots on the grid, focusing on the center and right side of the game board.
